creator: rsos+freebsd@mailbox.org
text:
Hello Christoph,

thanks for your insights into this issue! I hope there may be soon a solution for this problems with python. I haven't upgraded to FreeBSD 11 yet, can someone confirm that this issue still occur with it?

I mark this issue as a duplicate of bug #171246 and bug #206285.

Thanks!

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 171246 ***
